title: veronica alpina subsp. australis
intro: Veronica alpina subsp. australis, also known as Veronica australis or Australian speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family, Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Veronica alpina subsp. australis include treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
